title: Superflat Biome Extension
description: Adds a flat world type with regular biome distribution.
body:
Make superflat worlds but with all biomes available.
Screenshots ![image](https://i.imgur.com/zNaTDmI.png)
![image](https://i.imgur.com/GQJk0eJ.png)
To use this mod world gen select the Superflat Biome Extension world type in the world creation screen:
World creation ![image](https://i.imgur.com/gP4eIr8.png)
Several customization option are available: - Generate water: makes acquatic biomes generate a layer of water - Has features: makes features generate (trees, vegetation, amethyst geodes, etc.) - Has structures: makes structures generate (villages, strongholds, etc.) - Generate lakes: makes lakes generate (e.g. lava lakes) - Generate ores: makes ores generate (this includes underground andesite, diorite, gravel, etc.) Know issues:
-Ocean monuments generation is inconsistent, sometimes monuments generate at the incorrect height or place their bounding box incorrectly
-It's not possible to use the re-create option with this world type
Planned features:
-Add flat nether and end dimension
This mod is not compatible with other world gen mods, it shouldn't crash but biomes or structures added by other mods may generate incorrectly or not generate at all.
For any problem or suggestion open an [issue on github](https://github.com/Miki-Tellurium/SuperflatBiomeExtension/issues).
